roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING/3000ADM/X:PETITION IS AMENDED TO ADD VIOLATION #5, FAILURE TO COMPLETE SUBSTANCE ABUSEPROGRAM,/X: ADMITS VIOLATION #5/3000REIN/PAJ: 20 DAYS/CTORD:THERE IS NOTIME LOST ON PAROLE DUE TO THE ADMISSION OF THIS VIOLATION/X: PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 20 DAYS,/4019HALF/X: REMAINDER OF VIOLATIONS ARE DISMISSED/  /X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL: RETURN ON SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT FOR NON COMPLIANCE/NP/X: MATTER IS NOT REPORTED,/ /X: NO APPEARANCE BY THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY OR DEFENSECOUNSEL,/CONT/
